settings.title: The One-Cloth Habit That Spreads More Grime
settings.excerpt: Using a single cloth around the whole house does not clean it, it just relocates the dirt.
settings.body:
The most common cleaning mistake we see in homes is also the simplest to fix: one cloth, one bucket, the whole house.

Wiping the bathroom and then the kitchen with the same cloth carries bacteria straight from one to the other. The surfaces look clean and are anything but.

Use a colour for each zone. We keep separate cloths for bathrooms, kitchens, and general surfaces, and never cross them over. A cheap pack of coloured microfibres makes it foolproof.

Rinse in hot water as you go, and wash them properly at the end. A clean cloth is the whole game.
